data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

For 7 days from 10/11 (Mon), rewards dropped in Scrimmages will be doubled.
Don't miss out on this opportunity to upgrade your Exclusive Weapons!

🗓️Period: 10/10 (Mon) 19:00 – 10/17 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
